task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for system messages in the #finance-reports channel indicating that 'admin removed' contractor.smith, former.intern, dev.jones, and dev.wilson. Alternatively, check the channel members list to ensure these users are absent.

Look for system messages in the #hr-confidential channel indicating that 'admin removed' contractor.smith, former.intern, dev.jones, dev.wilson, and senior.analyst. Alternatively, check the channel members list to ensure these users are absent.

task_completion.description: Post audit trail messages in affected channels
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for chat messages posted by the admin in both #finance-reports and #hr-confidential. The messages must explicitly state which users were removed, explain why, and reference the 'Q1 2026 access review'.

task_completion.description: Create a new public channel named 'access-review-q1-2026'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '#access-review-q1-2026' in the left sidebar under the Channels list, or look at the active channel header showing this exact name.

task_completion.description: Post a summary report of all changes in the new review channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chat message posted by the admin in the #access-review-q1-2026 channel. The message should contain a summary of the user removals organized by channel (#finance-reports and #hr-confidential).

task_completion.description: Send direct messages to contractor.smith and former.intern
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Direct Messages in the left sidebar to 'contractor.smith' and 'former.intern'. The chat history for these DMs should show a message from the admin informing them that their access to restricted channels has been revoked per the quarterly review.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat GUI to perform actions
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the Rocket.Chat web interface or desktop application, rather than executing curl commands or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Messages are actually posted in the chat application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure that the audit trails, summary reports, and DMs are visible as sent messages within the Rocket.Chat message history, not just typed into the message input box without being sent, or written in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Actions are performed by the admin user
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the logged-in user performing the actions and posting the messages is 'admin', as seen in the bottom left user profile section or the message author tags.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The restricted channels are '#finance-reports' and '#hr-confidential'. Users that must be removed from '#finance-reports' are contractor.smith, former.intern, dev.jones, and dev.wilson. Users that must be removed from '#hr-confidential' are contractor.smith, former.intern, dev.jones, dev.wilson, and senior.analyst. The new review channel must be exactly named 'access-review-q1-2026'.
